meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: Learn how Fixeet collects, uses, and protects your personal information.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.body: Fixeet ("we", "us", or "our") operates the fixeet.co website and platform. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our services. By using Fixeet, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

informationWeCollect.title: Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.body: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, company name, and role when you register or contact us. We also collect usage data, including pages visited, features used, and actions taken within the platform, as well as technical data such as IP address, browser type, and device information.

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.body: We use your information to provide and improve our services, communicate with you about your account and updates, respond to inquiries and support requests, send relevant product information with your consent, and comply with legal obligations under Israeli law.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.body: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with trusted service providers who assist us in operating the platform, subject to confidentiality obligations. We may also disclose information when required by law or to protect the rights and safety of our users.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.body: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit and at rest to protect your personal information. While we strive to protect your data, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.body: Under the Israeli Privacy Protection Law (חוק הגנת הפרטיות, 5741-1981) and its regulations, you have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal information. To exercise these rights, please contact us at info@fixeet.co. We will respond to your request within a reasonable timeframe.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.body: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at info@fixeet.co or visit fixeet.co/contact.

meta.title: Terms of Service
meta.description: Read the terms and conditions governing your use of Fixeet services.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By accessing or using the Fixeet platform at fixeet.co, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services. These terms apply to all users, including construction companies, contractors, inspectors, and property owners.

useOfServices.title: Use of Services
useOfServices.body: You may use Fixeet solely for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. You agree not to misuse the platform, attempt to gain unauthorized access, interfere with service operations, or use the platform in any way that violates applicable Israeli or international laws and regulations.

userAccounts.title: User Accounts
userAccounts.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately at info@fixeet.co of any unauthorized use of your account. Fixeet reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.body: All content, features, and functionality of the Fixeet platform — including software, design, text, and graphics — are owned by Fixeet and protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works without our express written consent.

limitationOfLiability.title: Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Fixeet shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform. Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the amount you paid for the service in the twelve months preceding the claim.

termination.title: Termination
termination.body: Either party may terminate the service relationship at any time. Fixeet may suspend or terminate your access if you violate these terms, with or without notice. Upon termination, your right to use the platform ceases immediately. Provisions that by nature should survive termination will remain in effect.

changesToTerms.title: Changes to Terms
changesToTerms.body: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. We will notify registered users of material changes by email or through the platform. Continued use of Fixeet after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.body: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at info@fixeet.co or visit fixeet.co/contact.

meta.title: About Fixeet
meta.description: Learn about Fixeet's mission to transform construction defect management in Israel.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Fixeet exists to bring order to the chaos of construction defect management. We're building a platform that connects everyone involved — residents, construction companies, contractors, and inspectors — in a single, transparent workflow. From the moment a defect is reported to its verified resolution, Fixeet ensures nothing falls through the cracks.

problemDeepDive.title: Why Defect Management Is Broken
problemDeepDive.marketPain: In Israel's construction market, the defect liability period after building handover is a source of constant friction. Residents chase construction companies for updates. Managers juggle complaints across spreadsheets and WhatsApp groups. Workers arrive on-site without clear priorities. The result: delays, frustration, and repeated visits that waste everyone's time and money.
problemDeepDive.existingTools: Generic construction management tools were not designed for the defect liability period. They focus on project planning and scheduling — not on tracking individual defects across multiple stakeholders with different roles and needs. The gap between what's available and what's needed leaves everyone struggling with manual processes.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: We envision a future where every construction defect is resolved efficiently and transparently. Starting in the Israeli market, Fixeet is building the infrastructure for professional defect management that will scale across the construction and real estate industries — transforming how companies handle post-handover quality assurance.

hero.title: Manage Construction Defects Without the Chaos
hero.subtitle: One platform connecting residents, contractors, project managers, and tradespeople — from defect report to verified resolution.

points.chasing: Residents spend weeks chasing workers just to find out if their issues are even scheduled
points.frustration: Managers spend more time managing customer frustration than actually resolving defects
points.incomplete: Workers arrive on-site without a complete task list, fix some issues, and have to return multiple times
points.noVisibility: No one has a clear picture of what's outstanding, what's scheduled, and what's done

solution.title: One Platform. Full Visibility. Zero Chaos.

points.connected: One structured platform connecting residents, managers, workers, and contractors
points.tracked: Every defect is logged, assigned, scheduled, and tracked to verified completion
points.visibility: All stakeholders have the visibility they need — no more chasing, no more guessing

features.title: Everything You Need to Manage Defects

defectReporting.name: Defect Reporting with Media
defectReporting.description: Report issues on-site with text, photos, and videos — everything in one place

visitScheduling.name: Visit Scheduling
visitScheduling.description: Assign tasks to scheduled visits and notify workers — no more informal coordination

realTimeStatus.name: Real-Time Status Tracking
realTimeStatus.description: Every stakeholder sees the current status of every defect, from report to resolution

multiStakeholder.name: Multi-Stakeholder Coordination
multiStakeholder.description: Residents, managers, workers, and contractors all connected in a single workflow

audiences.title: Built for Everyone in the Process

inspector.label: Inspector
inspector.benefit: Eliminate hours of post-visit report writing. Capture defects on-site and generate reports automatically.

constructionCompany.label: Construction Company
constructionCompany.benefit: Gain full visibility into every defect lifecycle. Reduce operational costs and improve customer satisfaction.

contractor.label: Contractor
contractor.benefit: Get a clear, structured task list for every visit with all the context you need to get the job done.

apartmentOwner.label: Apartment Owner
apartmentOwner.benefit: Track every reported issue, see scheduled visits, and get real-time updates — without chasing anyone.

first.name: David Cohen
first.quote: Fixeet cut my report writing time in half. I can now focus on what matters — the inspection itself.

second.name: Sarah Levi
second.quote: We finally have visibility into our entire defect pipeline. Customer complaints dropped significantly.

third.name: Michael Azulay
third.quote: I know exactly what needs to be done before I arrive on-site. No more wasted trips.

PricingPage.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
PricingPage.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your construction defect management needs.
PricingPage.starterAudience: For trial users and private owners
PricingPage.starterDesc: Get started with essential defect management tools — completely free.
PricingPage.proDesc: Professional tools for small teams involved in construction projects.
PricingPage.enterpriseDesc: Full-scale defect management for any number of small and large buildings.
PricingPage.aiDocumentSearch: Chat to extract information from documents
PricingPage.comparePlansSubtitle: See exactly what's included in each plan.
PricingPage.needCustomPlanDesc: Starting from 10 active projects, Enterprise plans are tailored to your organization's specific needs.
PricingPage.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about our pricing and plans.
PricingPage.faq1q: Is the Starter plan really free?
PricingPage.faq1a: Yes, the Starter plan is completely free with no time limit. It includes 1 active project and unlimited defects — perfect for private owners or trying out the platform.
PricingPage.faq2a: Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.
PricingPage.faq3a: A defect is any reported issue in the system — whether it's a crack, a plumbing leak, or a paint defect. Each unique report counts as one defect. All plans include unlimited defects.
PricingPage.faq4q: Do I need to install anything?
PricingPage.faq4a: No. Fixeet is a web-based platform that works on any device with a browser. There's nothing to install.
PricingPage.faq5a: Project depth refers to the hierarchy levels within a project. For example, a building with floors and apartments has depth 2. Enterprise plans support unlimited project depth for complex organizational structures.
PricingPage.faq6a: Yes. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We comply with Israeli privacy regulations and industry best practices.
PricingPage.faq7q: What are the optional AI assistants?
PricingPage.faq7a: Pro and Enterprise plans can add AI-powered assistants for scheduling visits automatically and searching through project documents. These are optional add-ons to your plan.
PricingPage.faq8a: Enterprise plans start from 10 active projects at ₪30/month per project. Contact us for a tailored quote based on your organization's needs.
